titleStmt.title: SII 4.1068: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1068. (A.R. No. 227 of 1893). ON THE SAME WALL BETWEEN THE THIRD AND THE FOURTH PILLARS.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
dhipaḥ
mmāṁbikāpatyayōḥ.prāptasvargganivāsayōrapi hitē karṇnāṭa puṇyaprāptividhēya
svāminē śrīmadbhīmamahēśvarāya daśadigbhittisphuratkīrttayē . prādāditthamatīvanirmmalamatissaujanyaviśrāmabhūrāca
ṁdrārkkamakhaṇḍamaṇḍitadaśaṁ saddīpikāpaṁcakaṁ . śakavarṣa 1061 śrīkulōttuṁggacōḍadēvara divyarājyasaṁva 7 gu śrā
hi śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalēśvara kulōttuṁggacōḍagoṁkkarājula māmasvasti samadhikasamarasamōpārjjita jayāṁgganāliṁggita da
kṣiṇadōrddaṇḍa nirkkuvagaṇḍa vairibhāṁggāra bhāvanaṁkakāṟa Ubhayabalasubhaṭamunnaṟiva kalikaṟakalitanammeṟuva caturtthaku
laśēkhara gaṇḍaguṇākaru(ṁ)ṇḍaina śrīmaddaṇḍanāyaka māmapeṇḍaya śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvarakuṁdama taṇḍrimārināyaku
nikiṁ beṭṭina Akhaṇḍavartti diviya 1 tama talli mallāsānikiṁ beṭṭina Akhaṇḍavartti diviya 1 tamakugāṁ beṭṭina Akhaṇḍa
vartti diviya 1 tama koḍuku mārināyakunikigāṁ beṭṭina Akhaṇḍavartti diviya 1 reṇḍavu koḍku marināyakuniki
ṁ beṭṭina diviya 1 kilaramuna bōlu naluvuruṁ būṇṭagā modaliyaḍapuna bhīmabōla yāyti vasamuna viḍi
InupaEḍlu 50 nityapaḍi nētimā 1 reṇḍavunaḍapuna ṟoṁpabōla meṇṭani vasamuna viḍisina InupaEḍlu 50
ṇḍavuyaḍapuna navālakāprōlani vasamuna viḍisina InupaEḍlu 50 nityapaḍi nēti mā 1
niccina InupaEḍlu 50 nityapaḍi lapu naḍapuna kāmana prōlani vasamu
khitaṁ peddanācā Some lines of writing on the same slab at its right end run as follows:—
muna
kāṭamaseṭi talli Āytama śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvaraku
peṭṭina Akha(ṁ)ṇḍava¨rtti lōhadaṁḍu diviya 1 (Lines 5 to 8 are very faintly cut)
Digital edition of SII 4.1068 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
